scripts.test: npx playwright-bdd gherkin && npx playwright test
scripts.test:ui: npx playwright-bdd gherkin && npx playwright test --grep @ui
scripts.test:api: npx playwright-bdd gherkin && npx playwright test --grep @api
scripts.test:headed: npx playwright-bdd gherkin && npx playwright test --headed
scripts.test:debug: npx playwright-bdd gherkin && npx playwright test --debug
